docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-27-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, RAFAEL AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, ADAM SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-25-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-20-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-10-2011

MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-29-2011 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST RAFAEL REREZ, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-27-2011, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-13-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PEREZ, RAFAEL

NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-29-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-25-2011 CONTINUED TO MAY-13-2011 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-27-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AS TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE MAY-13-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2011 Continued To Aug-29-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 8/29/2011 at 1:30 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
